title: Vivi Changes the Priority
description: On pages 5–8, vivi changes the priority as nami falls seriously ill after Little Garden, forcing the crew to abandon the direct route to Alabasta and search for a doctor.
scene: Vivi Changes the Priority. Nami falls seriously ill after Little Garden, forcing the crew to abandon the direct route to Alabasta and search for a doctor. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Only the "Great serpent soaked in blood" can withstand our attacks!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Behold the mightiest spear of we giants of Elbaf...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What're you screaming for! We've already been swallowed alive!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Don't turn back now! Fly straight ahead!

summary: This part centers on vivi changes the priority, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
